data.body:
Given that I support de-anonymizing peer review, I said sure why not.

But before submitting I thought about my review again. I said the paper could be published post-R&R, but was I overly harsh in my comments? Now that the authors would learn my name, I decided to re-read my review. (2/3)

Turns out it isn't low probability after all.
